summary.key_theme: 市場高度期待 Apple 即將公布的財報表現，並看好其 AI 策略與硬體更新帶來的長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Forget Nvidia. Apple May Be the AI Stock Wall Street Is Quietly Betting On.
bullish.reason: 市場觀點轉向，認為 Apple 的 AI 策略具備獨特競爭力，甚至在市值上短暫超越 Nvidia，顯示投資人對其 AI 變現能力信心增強。

bullish.title: AAPL Plans Major MacBook, iMac Overhaul To Capitalize On AI-Fueled Demand For High-Performance Devices
bullish.reason: Apple 計劃對 MacBook 與 iMac 進行重大硬體更新，旨在利用 AI 需求推動換機潮，預期將顯著提升高階產品線營收。

bullish.title: As Wall Street Cuts Tesla, Morgan Stanley Raises Its Apple Target
bullish.reason: 摩根士丹利上調 Apple 目標價，對比 Tesla 的疲軟表現，凸顯 Apple 在營收紀錄與市場穩定性上的優勢。

bullish.title: Apple Could Seize a Quarter of the Foldable Phone Market in Year One
bullish.reason: Counterpoint 研究指出 Apple 進入摺疊機市場後，有望在首年即搶佔 25 % 市占率，展現強大的品牌滲透力。

bullish.title: Apple Maps To Be Integrated Into Upcoming Ford's Universal Electric Vehicle Platform
bullish.reason: Apple Maps 透過 Mapkit 整合至 Ford 電動車平台，進一步擴展其軟體生態系統至汽車領域。

bullish.title: Apple turns to Klarna for new device leasing program
bullish.reason: 透過 Klarna 提供裝置租賃方案，有助於降低高價產品門檻，進而提升 iPhone 等核心產品的銷售轉換率。

bearish.title: Samsung ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones ahead of expected Apple debut
bearish.reason: Samsung 發布新款摺疊機，並透過與 Qualcomm 深度合作強化硬體規格，對 Apple 即將推出的摺疊產品構成直接競爭壓力。

bearish.title: Apple (AAPL) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 1.3 %，表現弱於大盤，反映短期獲利了結賣壓。

bearish.title: Tech Stocks Forecasts – AAPL, MSFT, and AMZN Face Pre-Market Pullbacks
bearish.reason: 受整體科技股盤前疲軟影響，Apple 股價出現短期回調壓力。

neutral.title: 47 Analysts Cover Apple. Their Average Price Target Is Now Below the Stock Price
neutral.reason: 平均目標價低於現價，顯示分析師對短期股價漲幅持保留態度，但仍維持買進評級，多空觀點分歧。

neutral.title: Apple (AAPL) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
neutral.reason: 市場預期財報將有亮眼表現，但投資人仍在等待 7 月 30 日正式公布的數據以確認成長動能。
